query:
INSERT INTO content_pages (slug, title, content, metaDescription, isPublished) VALUES ('terms-and-conditions', 'Terms and Conditions', '

Terms and Conditions

Welcome to Taiwan Maami. By using our website and services, you agree to these terms.

Order Policy

Orders can be cancelled only before food preparation begins. Once preparation has started, orders cannot be cancelled or changed.

Payment

All prices are in Indian Rupees (INR) and include applicable taxes. Payment must be made at the time of ordering for online orders.

Delivery

Delivery is available within 10km of T. Nagar outlet. Delivery charges apply for orders below ₹2500.

', 'Terms and Conditions for Taiwan Maami online ordering and services', true), ('privacy-policy', 'Privacy Policy', '

Privacy Policy

Taiwan Maami respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data.

Information We Collect

We collect information you provide when placing orders, creating an account, or contacting us.

How We Use Your Information

We use your information to process orders, improve our services, and communicate with you about your orders.

Data Security

We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information.

', 'Privacy Policy for Taiwan Maami - how we collect, use, and protect your data', true), ('refund-policy', 'Refund Policy', '

Refund Policy

At Taiwan Maami, we strive to ensure your satisfaction with every order.

Cancellation

Orders can be cancelled before preparation begins. No refunds for orders already in preparation.

Quality Issues

If you receive an incorrect or damaged order, please contact us immediately for a replacement or refund.

Refund Process

Approved refunds will be processed within 5-7 business days to the original payment method.

', 'Refund and cancellation policy for Taiwan Maami orders', true);
